description: Upload high-quality source imagery only. Prefer clean, well-lit assets with clear subject focus so responsive crops stay premium across desktop and mobile.

fields.description: Required. Describe what matters in the image in plain language. Mention the visible subject or proof shown, not styling alone. For decorative textures, use a short label such as 'Abstract blue signal texture' only if the image is still exposed to assistive tech.
fields.name: alt
fields.title: Alt Text

fields.description: Optional. Add only when the image needs context, attribution, or a short proof note. Keep it concise.
fields.name: caption

fields.description: Choose the intended visual job for this asset. Use landscape roles like Cover, Gallery, or Background for wide compositions. Use Portrait when the subject is vertically framed. Use Texture only for decorative atmosphere, not proof.
fields.name: imageRole
fields.title: Image Role / Type

fields.description: Optional editor note describing what must stay in frame, such as 'keep character face centered' or 'UI stats top-right'. This helps future editors set hotspot correctly for responsive crops.
fields.name: focalIntent

fields.description: Optional source, photographer, renderer, stock source, or internal asset note.
fields.name: credit
fields.title: Credit / Source

name: richImage

fields.description: Use internal paths like /contact or full external URLs.
fields.name: href

fields.description: Use an internal path or anchor target.
fields.name: href
fields.title: CTA Href

fields.description: Use for stills, UI captures, renders, or gallery frames. Recommended: 1600 to 2400px wide, under 800 KB when possible. Use landscape for environments and UI walkthroughs, portrait only when the subject is vertically composed.
fields.name: image

fields.description: Optional poster used for video previews and thumbnails. Recommended: 1600px+ wide, under 500 KB. Set hotspot on the key visual area because this image may crop differently in cards and gallery layouts.
fields.name: poster
fields.title: Video Poster

fields.description: Optional hosted video URL for embeds or previews.
fields.name: videoUrl
fields.title: Video URL

fields.description: Primary brand label shown in the header, footer, and metadata.
fields.name: studioName

fields.description: Concise positioning line used for trust and SEO surfaces.
fields.name: tagline

fields.description: Optional brand mark for future header, share image, or presentation use. Recommended: square or transparent PNG/SVG-friendly artwork at 800x800 minimum. Keep file size lean and use a clean silhouette that reads on dark backgrounds.
fields.name: studioLogo

fields.description: Used for metadata and link previews. Recommended: 1200x630 (social share ratio), ideally under 500 KB. Keep text minimal, high contrast, and safely inset from edges.
fields.name: defaultShareImage

fields.description: Use a premium, atmospheric landscape image for the homepage hero. Recommended: 2400x1350 or larger (16:9), ideally under 1.2 MB. Use this for mood and brand tone, not dense proof details. Keep the main focal area off the edges and set hotspot around the subject that must survive mobile crops.
fields.name: heroBackgroundImage

fields.description: The three quick-path cards directly below the homepage hero.
fields.name: outcomeCards

fields.description: Short cards describing who the studio is built for.
fields.name: buyerTypes

fields.description: Optional. Leave blank if the client should stay confidential.
fields.name: clientName

fields.description: Used for portfolio filters and delivery role context.
fields.name: serviceTags

fields.description: Primary project proof image for cards and case-study hero fallback. Recommended: 1600x900 to 2400x1350 (16:9), ideally under 900 KB. Use a landscape asset that communicates outcome fast. Prefer gameplay, UI, or a strong branded scene over decorative artwork.
fields.name: coverImage

fields.description: Short top-line result or capability statement.
fields.name: headline

fields.description: Optional for confidential work.
fields.name: challenge

fields.description: Short success criteria the project was built around.
fields.name: goals

fields.description: Short buyer-facing result statements. Keep concise and proof-oriented.
fields.name: outcomes

fields.description: What changed, what was built, and why it mattered.
fields.name: solution

fields.description: Leave empty if public metrics should stay private.
fields.name: resultsMetrics

fields.description: Add image entries for gallery stills and optional video entries with a hosted URL plus poster image. Mix wide proof images with occasional portrait frames for visual rhythm. Recommended stills: 1600 to 2400px on the long edge, usually under 800 KB. Leave empty for confidential work.
fields.name: galleryMedia
fields.title: Gallery Images and Video

fields.description: Shown when metrics or media are intentionally limited.
fields.name: confidentialityNote

fields.description: Three hex colors used for card and case-study gradients.
fields.name: palette

fields.description: Optional quote shown on the project detail page.
fields.name: testimonial
fields.title: Linked Testimonial

fields.description: Short buyer-facing results this service is meant to support.
fields.name: outcomes

fields.description: How buyers usually engage this service.
fields.name: engagementModel

fields.description: Optional supporting image for service cards or section accents. Recommended: 1200x900 (4:3) or 1600x900 (16:9), ideally under 700 KB. Use clean proof or directional mood imagery, not noisy backgrounds that compete with copy.
fields.name: featuredImage

fields.description: Lower numbers appear first.
fields.name: orderRank
fields.title: Order

fields.description: Optional headshot or logo lockup for quote presentation. Use a portrait asset when featuring a person; use a clean square or vertical logo lockup when the brand should carry the trust signal. Use a clean portrait or logo lockup with strong subject separation. Recommended: 1200x1500 (4:5) or 1080x1350, ideally under 500 KB. Use portrait orientation when the subject is a person, speaker, or brand mark that reads best vertically.
fields.name: portrait

fields.description: Short line describing the delivery value this person adds.
fields.name: focus
fields.title: Trust Signal

fields.description: Optional profile image. Leave empty if the team profile is text-only. Use a clean portrait or logo lockup with strong subject separation. Recommended: 1200x1500 (4:5) or 1080x1350, ideally under 500 KB. Use portrait orientation when the subject is a person, speaker, or brand mark that reads best vertically. Set hotspot on the eyes or face so tight crops still feel intentional on smaller cards.
fields.name: portrait
